title: oxybaphus rotatus
intro: Oxybaphus rotatus, also known as Mexican Buckwheat or Poppy Mallow, is a perennial flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxybaphus rotatus include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and relieving respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
